specDetail.description: Git management interface for visualizing repository operations. Feature is not yet implemented — currently shows only a placeholder heading.
parameters: Placeholder page with Git heading only
No diff view, commit history, or branch management UI implemented

constraints: Feature not yet implemented — displays placeholder only
Git operations currently handled via branch-management in project management

acceptanceCriteria.given: a user navigates to the git page
acceptanceCriteria.then: a Git heading is displayed as placeholder
